features.title: Modern, Air-Conditioned Vehicles
features.description: Clean, comfortable transport for city and long-distance tours.

features.title: Professional English-Speaking Drivers
features.description: Friendly local drivers with reliable communication and tour support.

features.title: Flight Tracking for Airport Pickups
features.description: Pickup timing adjusts automatically to your live arrival schedule.

features.title: 24/7 Availability
features.description: Flexible pickup times for airport arrivals and early departures.

features.title: 60 Minutes Free Airport Waiting Time
features.description: Extra buffer included so you can clear arrivals without stress.

features.title: No Hidden Fees
features.description: Transparent pricing with all core costs confirmed before your ride.

vehicleTypes.title: Sedan (1-3 Passengers)
vehicleTypes.description: Best for solo travelers, couples, or compact airport transfers.

vehicleTypes.title: Minivan (4-7 Passengers)
vehicleTypes.description: Ideal for families and small groups with moderate luggage.

vehicleTypes.title: Minibus (8-15 Passengers)
vehicleTypes.description: Great for larger groups, day trips, and shared travel plans.
